prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.1 kg; Height 166.8 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 214mg/dL; 9 months ago 236mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 192mg/dL; current 187mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.7kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 63.2kg; 3 months ago 64.9kg; current 67.1kg), Height (12 months ago 166.8cm; 9 months ago 166.8cm; 6 months ago 166.8cm; 3 months ago 166.8cm; current 166.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 48U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 39U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 350mg/g; 9 months ago 289mg/g; 6 months ago 307mg/g; 3 months ago 318mg/g; current 441mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 128mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
